---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for FediSpace
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

A clear description of the problem or use case this feature would address.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the feature.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature is relevant to FediSpace as a Pixelfed client
